bead.title: Delete and unexport claude public surface
bead.description:
Source manifest: .ddx/beads-harness-interface-refactor.yaml
Source bead ID: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05E
Governing plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md

See the manifest and the plan for full context, touch-point inventory, and sub-sequence ordering.
bead.acceptance:
1. ClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision struct, DecideClaudeQuotaRouting, ReadClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision deleted
2. ClaudeQuotaSnapshot lowercased to claudeQuotaSnapshot (package-private)
3. ReadClaudeQuota, ReadClaudeQuotaFrom, WriteClaudeQuota, ClaudeQuotaCachePath, IsClaudeQuotaFresh, ClaudeQuotaSnapshotAge, DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter unexported
4. ReadClaudeQuotaViaPTY, RefreshClaudeQuotaViaPTY, ReadClaudeQuotaFromCassette, DefaultClaudeModelDiscovery, ResolveClaudeFamilyAlias, ReadClaudeReasoningFromHelp, IsClaudeQuotaExhaustedMessage, MarkClaudeQuotaExhaustedFromMessage unexported
5. RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync deleted; the Step 4 scheduler now drives claude refresh cadence
6. Pre-merge check: reverting only this bead (without reverting 05A–05D) leaves the tree compiling and tests green
7. go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass
